spec_match.rationale: The demo now mounts real same-origin, opaque-origin data:, and sandboxed iframes and applies the selected filters to their wrappers for native rendering.

interactive.rationale: The select dropdown now updates wrapper filters around actual iframe content instead of toggling synthetic mock elements.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The explanation of SVG filters being stripped from sandboxed frames matches the feature's core definition.

edge_cases.rationale: The page covers same-origin, opaque-origin, and sandboxed frame behavior using real embedded documents.

references.rationale: The page now includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5117170452398080 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Follows styling guidelines well with clean contrast, responsive layout, and standard crumbs/lede blocks.

summary: The Sandbox Filter Test now uses real iframe documents for the same-origin, opaque-origin, and sandboxed cases, applies filters to their wrappers, and includes the required ChromeStatus link.
